reviews.comment:
Una estación de servicios ACA con una muy buena atencion algo para resolver lo antes posible es el tiempo que se pierde y el peligro que implica hacer una fila en la calle en un lugar con un transito de vehículos muy alto lo que lleva en ocaciones a discusiones entre los automovilistas ademas por supuesto del peligro de un accidente de cualquier tipo

(Translated by Google)
An ACA service station with very good service. Something that needs to be resolved as soon as possible is the time lost and the danger of standing in line on the street in a place with very high vehicle traffic, which sometimes leads to arguments between motorists, in addition to, of course, the danger of an accident of any kind.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzeXZtcEdREAE

reviews.comment:
Si tenes tiempo osea no tenes nada de nada de apuros y te sobra todas las horas de el día anda por que tienen una fiaka para atender te dormis una siesta y todabia no te atendieron a unas cuadras de ahí tenes una Shell 10 veces mejor servicio

(Translated by Google)
If you have time, meaning you're not in any hurry and have all the hours of the day to spare, go there because they're incredibly slow with service. You could take a nap and they still won't have helped you. A few blocks away there's a Shell station with ten times better service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzc3ZtTTlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El tramite de renovacionse hace rápido, el inmueble es muy señorial, pero los empleados de planta baja atienden sin ganas, teniendo q abrir las puertas 7.30 no ñas abren y se hacen los distraidos para no atender. Patetico.

(Translated by Google)
The renewal process is quick, the building is very stately, but the ground-floor employees are reluctant to serve you. They have to open the doors at 7:30 a.m. and pretend they're distracted to avoid answering. Pathetic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzMHJleE9nEAE

reviews.comment:
Un especial sitio propio de la marca YPF. Asimismo funciona el Automóvil Club Argentino, entidad señera de nuestro país.  Excelente atención. Museo digno de recorrerlo. Recomiendo no perderse una visita y si te place hacerte socio.

(Translated by Google)
A special YPF brand-owned site. It also houses the Automóvil Club Argentino, a leading institution in our country. Excellent service. A museum well worth visiting. I highly recommend a visit, and if you're interested, consider becoming a member.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVNG9lUFhBEAE
